narrative:
Precinct Staunton North (precinct in Miami County) has 880 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
